hero.title: School Administration
hero.description: A calm private workspace for smaller schools, tutors, training centres, and early-stage institutions to organize students, classes, enrolments, attendance, and summaries.
points: Attendance summaries without SIS or LMS scope

flow.title: Students → Classes → Attendance → Insights
steps: Record attendance and review operational summaries

differences.title: Focused school administration without enterprise SIS scope
differences.description: School Administration V1 keeps everyday records organized without government integrations, admissions processing, fee collection, parent portals, biometric attendance, grading, or LMS functionality.

items.title: Students
items.description: Store admission numbers, guardian contacts, statuses, emergency contacts, support notes, and current class context.

items.title: Classes
items.description: Create classes, track capacity, and assign students through explicit enrolments.

items.title: Attendance
items.description: Record class/date attendance and review status totals with clear calculation basis.

feel.title: A quiet school office workspace
feel.description: The experience is built for quick scanning, careful updates, and private record keeping rather than public portals or academic content delivery.

items.title: Organized records
items.description: Students, classes, enrolments, and attendance are separated into predictable workflow pages.

items.title: Clear limits
items.description: The app does not pretend to replace a full SIS, LMS, payment gateway, or government reporting system.

items.title: Operational summaries
items.description: Insights are derived only from stored user records and handle empty datasets cleanly.

audiences.title: Who uses School Administration
audiences.description: School Administration is for smaller education operators who need private record organization before they need a full enterprise platform.

items.title: Small schools
items.description: Maintain students, classes, and daily attendance in one protected workspace.

items.title: Tutors and training centres
items.description: Track enrolments and attendance without adopting a full SIS.

items.title: Early-stage institutions
items.description: Start with practical records while future governance considers larger administration needs.

resourceSection.title: School Administration essentials
resourceSection.description: V1 stays focused on private records and operational summaries.

items.title: Students
items.description: CRUD records with admission number uniqueness and guardian/support details.

items.title: Classes
items.description: CRUD records with capacity, teacher, academic year, and explicit enrolments.

items.title: Attendance
items.description: Class/date attendance with duplicate prevention and safe attendance-rate calculation.

groupedSection.title: What V1 includes and excludes
groupedSection.description: The app provides a focused administration workspace, not a complete school information system.

items.name: Portals and payments
items.description: No parent/student portal, admissions processing, or fee collection.

items.name: Academic systems
items.description: No LMS, exams, grades, biometric attendance, or government reporting.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: School Administration runs inside the shared shell with owner-scoped APIs, isolated persistence, and generated frontend contracts.
items: Explicit enrolments instead of free-text-only class storage.
Owner-scoped students, classes, enrolments, attendance, and insights.

finalCta.title: Open School Administration
finalCta.description: Start with the student records workflow.
